description: Inviolable canonical facts for Hantavirus Nuble EID paper. Any automated agent or skill MUST check against this file before proposing fixes, edits, or novel claims. Sourced from CANONICAL_BLINDAJES_INDEX.md (M14 catalog), obsidian_vault Crisis Datos SEREMI, Panel Oficial M1M2, and project_sesion_code_S60_MASTER_COMPLETO.md.

facts_geographic_administrative.region_pre_2018: Biobio Region (VIII) - Nuble was a province of Biobio
facts_geographic_administrative.region_NEVER_WAS: Maule Region (VII) - this is a common LLM hallucination, NEVER use

facts_panel_canonical.panel_assignment_criterion: probable commune of infection (NOT commune of residence)
facts_panel_canonical.panel_previous_version_problem: Prior Gemini-generated panel (M1_panel_v5) had 187 discrepancies; used residence-based coding and IA-assigned cases; INVALIDATED
facts_panel_canonical.panel_previous_version_misallocation_exa: 23 Yungay residents whose exposure occurred in El Carmen, Coihueco and Chillan
facts_panel_canonical.panel_exclusion_1: invalid date 30-February-2020 corrected to 30-March-2020 via notification log cross-check (retained)
facts_panel_canonical.panel_exclusion_2: one record assigned to Nacimiento (a commune of Biobio Region outside study area)
facts_panel_canonical.panel_exclusion_3: one record with blank commune field
facts_panel_canonical.dospital_2024_error: Dospital et al. 2024 BJB reports 3.0/100k; this is WRONG - confuses age-stratified rate (20-24 yrs) with regional rate. DO NOT CITE for regional incidence.

facts_model_S29K.primary_exposure: R_v1_lag5_within_sc (forest stress index FSI, 5-month lag, within-commune Bell-Jones decomposition, scaled)
facts_model_S29K.biological_lag_rationale: Chusquea quila flowering -> rodent reservoir build-up (Gonzalez 2001; Polop et al. 2010)
facts_model_S29K.IRR_note: Both values documented; primary = 0.734 on full panel. Do NOT confuse.
facts_model_S29K.EPV_note: Manuscrito v5 v2 reporta ambos valores (Methods line 160). Valor 15.4 del catalogo S54 era legacy y ha sido actualizado. Manuscrito es canonico.
facts_model_S29K.leakage_correction: S51_CORREGIR_LEAKAGE.R delta AUC=0.0002; verified no look-ahead
facts_model_S29K.BSS_Tier3_status: pathological (BS_Poisson approx 0); use log score as primary scoring rule

facts_references_corrected.paho_2023_regional_hantavirus_guidelines: HALLUCINATION - does not exist. Do NOT cite. Detected S60.
facts_references_corrected.paho_2025_epi_alert: REAL: Epidemiological Alert - Hantavirus in the Region of the Americas - 19 December 2025; URL: paho.org/en/documents/epidemiological-alert-hantavirus-region-americas-19-december-2025; Chile 35 cases CFR 22.2%
facts_references_corrected.fernandez_manso_2016_FABRICATED_DOI: 10.1016/j.jag.2016.02.002 is Guo et al. 2016 (soils), NOT Fernandez-Manso
facts_references_corrected.dimitriadis_2021_FABRICATED_DOI: 10.1016/j.ijforecast.2020.08.008 is Taleb et al. 2022 (fat tails), NOT Dimitriadis
facts_references_corrected.dimitriadis_2021_REAL_DOI: 10.1073/pnas.2016191118 (PNAS, stable reliability diagrams; but does NOT treat BSS parametric bootstrap)

facts_bias_counts.nb_note: All 6 NB are in MC projection / Supplementary only. None affect paper inferential core.

usage_rules_for_agents: NEVER propose a fix for an item already blindado in CANONICAL_BLINDAJES_INDEX.md - report as BLINDADO_EXISTING instead
NEVER invent DOIs - always verify via Crossref API
NEVER claim Nuble was part of Maule Region - it was Biobio
NEVER cite PAHO 2023 regional hantavirus guidelines - it is a hallucination
NEVER use residence-based case allocation - canonical is probable commune of infection
NEVER confuse 133 cases (legacy STD panel) with 136 cases (canonical M1M2 panel)
NEVER exceed 3500 words main text or 50 references for EID
NEVER confuse IRR 0.734 (primary) with 0.701 (sidecar) - cite both only if discussing robustness
ALWAYS cross-reference against memory_bundle.json + CANONICAL_BLINDAJES_INDEX.md before reporting a finding
ALWAYS preserve SHA256 0b87c5b46b1894a822d2c31ce880ef7452e24ba4b98d6e66bffc4b38eeb4802a as dataset integrity anchor
